'''''Star Wars Gamer Special Edition''''' was the preview issue of ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine, published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2000]].

==Contents==
*''Letter from the Editor'' by [[Christopher Perkins]]
*''[[Understanding the Jedi Code]]'' by [[J.D. Wiker]]
*[[Duel of the Fates (article)|''Duel of the Fates'']] by [[Andy Collins]]
*''[[Shipbuilding Secrets]]'' by [[Thomas M. Reid]]
*"[[Light Side Dark Side]]" by [[Aaron Williams]]
